description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular structure with four vertical panels, each featuring vibrant printed graphics of autumn leaves and a woman's face. The panels are framed by thin, dark structural lines, giving the kiosk a clean and modern appearance. The graphics prominently display the text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' in bold, black and orange letters, vertically aligned on one side. The kiosk stands on a wooden platform, which contrasts with the bright, colorful imagery of the panels. There are no visible windows or doors, and the structure appears to be fully enclosed. The roof is flat and simple, matching the minimalist and functional design of the overall kiosk.
description: A tall, rectangular kiosk with vivid autumn-themed printed graphics and bold signage, framed by dark structural lines and set on a wooden platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main signage 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' and a large image of a woman's face surrounded by autumn leaves, with a person standing beside the kiosk.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the woman's face more prominently, with the signage partially visible and the person standing closer to the panel.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the kiosk again shows the main signage and autumn graphics, with the person now positioned behind the kiosk.
description_view_3: This rear view focuses on the woman's face and autumn leaves, with no signage visible and no person in the frame.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into side panels, vertical orientation, text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' in black and orange.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, simple design, no overhangs or decorative elements, likely made of aluminum or plastic.
